title: Brand Basics
description: A practical summary of your brand, ready to support future campaigns, team onboarding, and pitch decks. Based on interviews with stakeholders, it brings together everything your team needs to know about the brand today, helping everyone stay on the same page.
whatYouGet: One essential document covering your positioning, key strengths, audience, mission, vision, and brand character — all explained in clear, practical language and tailored to your needs.
